question: Will the ICE deployment in Minnesota be substantially reduced by June 1, 2026?
reason: Operation Metro Surge concluded in February 2026, with agents withdrawing from Minnesota.
evidence: Operation Metro Surge began on December 1, 2025, with over 2,000 federal agents deployed.
The operation concluded in February 2026, with agents withdrawing from Minnesota.
As of May 27, 2026, no reports indicate active ICE deployments in Minnesota.
The Department of Homeland Security announced the end of the operation in February 2026.
Local news sources confirm the withdrawal of federal agents from Minnesota in February 2026.
